title: The 10-Minute SaaS Financial Model
subtitle: Stop Guessing Your Runway. Start Winning Your Pitch.
descriptionBody: "How much cash do we have left?" "What's our CAC Payback if we hire two devs?" If these questions keep you up at 3:00 AM, welcome to the club. Most founders treat their financial models like a scary basement, terrified of what they'll find or lost in a sea of broken formulas.
section1Body: A battle-tested, "clean-code" version of the exact spreadsheets used by venture-backed startups to track growth, burn, and valuation.

features.name: The Vibe Check Dashboard
features.desc: One-page summary of MRR, ARR, LTV/CAC, and Runway.

features.name: The Growth Engine
features.desc: No "magic" numbers—input your pricing and churn to see the waterfall.

features.name: The Crystal Ball
features.desc: Instant sensitivity analysis—toggle one cell and see your 3-year valuation update.

features.name: OpEx Planner
features.desc: Simple hiring and team growth planning.

features.name: Valuation Engine
features.desc: ARR Multiples + DCF for the finance nerds.

whyPoints.title: Save 20+ Hours
whyPoints.desc: Your time is worth more than $1.50/hour. Spend it selling instead.

whyPoints.title: No "Broken Formula" Panic
whyPoints.desc: Every cell is linked, protected, and sanity-checked by an accountant who actually likes this stuff (me).

whyPoints.title: Look Like a Pro
whyPoints.desc: Stop sending messy CSVs. Send a structured model that proves you know your numbers.

footerResultDetails: Total clarity on your startup's future.
whoThisIsFor: SaaS founders raising a seed round
MBA / VC analysts modeling SaaS startups

faq.q: Is this Excel or Google Sheets?
faq.a: The model works in Excel and can be imported into Google Sheets.
Yes, the model is fully editable.
Yes, one purchase gives you lifetime access.

faq.q: Is this suitable for early-stage startups?
faq.a: Yes, it is designed for founders building SaaS financial projections.
